calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: REPORT, FEES
Off Calendar Jul-19-2011 Granted Per Written Order

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION WITH WILL ANNEXED
Off Calendar Feb-17-2009 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Jonathan Ferdon for the Petitioner. Jan Bernard, Elizabeth Lundberg and Nancy Evans for the First Unitarian were also present.

Mr. Ferdon confirmed that a copy of the petition was served on all of the individuals listed on item 8. The Court granted the petition, (signing the order for the same in open court). The Court instructed Mr. Ferdon to serve a copy of the Order For Probate on all of the individuals named in the petition. The will was admitted to probate.

Judge: David L. Ballati. Reporter: Susan Lee, CSR#4280. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy F. Smith.
